title: 7 Defensive Stocks to Buy for a Bear Market
text: As Wall Street gets ready for another earnings season, investors are increasingly chasing after defensive stocks to buy for a bear market. The post 7 Defensive Stocks to Buy for a Bear Market appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Downside Risks To Kimberly-Clark's Share Price Are Mounting
text: Kimberly-Clark has a fantastic business that has been around for 150 years. It's not going away anytime soon. Inflationary pressures are taking a bite out of Kimberly-Clark's operating profits, and price increases haven't been enough to keep things moving in the right direction.

title: Kimberly-Clark Professional™ Expands The RightCycle™ Program to Include Recycling of Used Plastic Packaging
text: ROSWELL, Ga. , June 22, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Kimberly-Clark Professional, a global leader in contamination control solutions for cleanrooms and laboratories, has expanded The RightCycle Program, the first large-scale recycling effort for non-hazardous lab, cleanroom and industrial PPE waste.

title: 7 Blue-Chip Stocks That Will Outlast Any Market Downturn
text: With signs pointing to a possible recession on the horizon, here are the best blue-chip stocks to buy to protect your portfolio. The post 7 Blue-Chip Stocks That Will Outlast Any Market Downturn appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Kimberly-Clark Named One of the Top 75 Companies for Executive Women by Seramount for the Sixth Consecutive Year
text: DALLAS , June 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ --  Kimberly-Clark  today announced that it was named one of the Top 75 Companies for Executive Women by Seramount for the sixth consecutive year. The list recognizes U.S.-based corporations that champion women's advancement in leadership roles, with a focus on succession planning, gender pay parity, benefits programs and flexible work policies.

title: Kimberly-Clark's (KMB) Strategic Growth Pillars & Savings Aid
text: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) is committed to its three key strategic growth pillars. Management is focused on efficiently managing costs amid an inflationary environment.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrats That Are Beating the Market
text: It is tough to find stocks that are outperforming the market these days as nearly all companies struggle with the effects of high inflation. Those in search of safer returns are often out of luck even when it comes to dividend stocks, since even a dividend yield of 3% does not come close to keeping up with inflation.

title: Huggies® And Meijer Join Forces To Support NICU Families
text: Huggies will donate up to $60,000 to non-profit Hand to Hold ® as part of its 2022 Project Hug™ campaign NEENAH, Wis. , June 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Huggies ® and Meijer are partnering again this year to support NICU (Neonatal Intensive Care Unit) families through Hand to Hold ®, a national nonprofit organization that provides personalized care to NICU parents through early intervention mental health support in both English and Spanish.
